body_txt: An extreme version of the Big Eater which is usually fat, usually a monster of some type, eats the hero or some other innocent bystander. But they don't chew , they don't rip the body up into smaller chunks to fit in their mouths — they just swallow the victim whole in one or two gulps. It's often a fate in settings that feature dinosaurs or kaiju , although in Real Life there are few if any animals who could realistically inflict such a fate on a human. A Sub-Trope of Eaten Alive . When a character tries to invoke this trope, it is a case of Eat Me . If a character kills or injures the being that swallowed them this way, see Kill It Through Its Stomach . If a video game boss battle starts this way, see Belly of the Boss . Compare Just Eat Him and Eaten Alive . May overlap with Just Desserts . If the person eaten gets out alive and not much worse for wear it's Getting Eaten Is Harmless . This is among the most common ways of invoking Black Comedy Predation , whether or not the prey survives. In video games, can sometimes lead to a Womb Level set inside of the consuming creature. When the eaten mentions, considers or even ends up escaping using the... uh... "back door", then this trope has led to the Anuscape Plan . Loosely related to "Fantastic Voyage" Plot . Contrast Orifice Invasion (when the orifice is the mouth).
